ddls:
CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "disease_category" TEXT /* Category of the disease (e.g., Cardiovascular, Dermatological) */,
  "disease_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the disease */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the disease was added to the platform */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the disease information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inefficient_nutrients" (
  "inefficient_nutrient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inefficient nutrient */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease the nutrient is associated with */,
  "nutrient_name" TEXT /* Name of the nutrient */,
  "nutrient_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of why the nutrient is inefficient for the disease */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the nutrient was added */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the nutrient information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inefficient_nutrient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inefficient_nutrients_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precautions" (
  "precaution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precaution */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease the precaution is associated with */,
  "precaution_name" TEXT /* Name of the precaution */,
  "precaution_description" TEXT /* Description of the precaution */,
  "precaution_type" TEXT /* Type of the precaution (e.g., Lifestyle, Diet) */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the precaution was added */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the precaution information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precaution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precautions_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the patient was added to the platform */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the patient information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_diseases" (
  "patient_disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient-disease relationship */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease */,
  "date_diagnosed" TEXT /* Date when the patient was diagnosed with the disease */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the patient-disease relationship was added to the platform */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the patient-disease relationship information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_diseases_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_diseases_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient engagement */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., Nutrition Plan Review, Precaution Consultation) */,
  "engagement_details" TEXT /* Details of the engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_engagement_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutrients" (
  "nutrient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nutrient */,
  "nutrient_name" TEXT /* Name of the nutrient */,
  "nutrient_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the nutrient */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the nutrient was added */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the nutrient information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nutrient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_nutrients" (
  "disease_nutrient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease-nutrient relationship */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease */,
  "nutrient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nutrient */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the disease-nutrient relationship was added */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the disease-nutrient relationship information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_nutrient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_nutrients_nutrient_id FOREIGN KEY ("nutrient_id") REFERENCES nutrients ("nutrient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_nutrients_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_precautions" (
  "disease_precaution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease-precaution relationship */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease */,
  "precaution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the precaution */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the disease-precaution relationship was added */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the disease-precaution relationship information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_precaution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_precautions_precaution_id FOREIGN KEY ("precaution_id") REFERENCES precautions ("precaution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_precautions_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)
